verdict_reasoning: HSPA1A encodes the inducible cytosolic HSP70 chaperone, canonically intracellular. However, it is well-documented that HSP70 (HSP72) translocates to the outer leaflet of the plasma membrane on tumor cells, stressed cells, and apoptotic/necrotic cells. Cell-surface HSP70 on cancer cells is a recognized cancer-restricted ecto-form targeted by antibodies and NK-cell-based therapies. Heat-shock, hypoxia, and other stress conditions also drive PM display. The protein body thus reaches the extracellular face in a cell-state-dependent manner qualifying as contextual/cell_state_induced, not constitutive surface biology.
